name: Human Holdings Co., Ltd.
summary: Human Holdings Co., Ltd. operates in human resource business in Japan. The company offers solutions to various human resources issues, such as recruitment, organization, consulting, personnel introduction, outsourcing, etc.; education services, including training of human resources, acquisition and improvement of skills, acquisition of specialized knowledge and qualifications, science classroom for children, Japanese language education for foreigners, e-learning system, MBA programs, kids and junior school, full-time specialized school, evening weekend course, and translation services. It also provides day care, home help, multifunctional home care, nursing small-scale multifunctional home care, communal living care for dementia patients, and elderly nursing home services, as well as lectures and trainings for corporations and organizations to acquire nursing care related qualifications; and operates public childcare facilities comprising of authorized and certified childcare centers, as well as childcare centers within companies, hospitals, and universities. In addition, the company operates nail salon under the DASHING DIVA name; and develops and sells gel original nail related products; and manages and operates Ookini Arena Maishima equipped with 4 projectors, 52 moving lights, and 4 LED visions to promote music and sports events; Osaka Evessa, a professional basketball team; engages in advertising business consisting of PR / advertising planning and production, and sales promotion and merchandising services. Further, it engages in the Website production and system development businesses. Human Holdings Co., Ltd. was founded in 1985 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
